rulings.Case Title: ROBERT MEYER et al VS. DEAN ELCHINOFF et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Against Defendant David Elchinoff And To Enjoin Defendant From Coming On The Property, And For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 9, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFFs ROBERT MEYER and DIANNE BOATE's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Against Defendant David Elchinoff And To Enjoin Defendant From Coming On The Property, And For Attorneys Fees And Costs GRANTED including request for attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $3,240. Defendant David Elchinoff is in breach of the Settlement Agreement. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS MCELLIGOTT VS. ASIF SIDDIQUE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 9, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFF DENNIS MCELLIGOTT's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint DENIED. Case is set for trial on June 15, 2015. If the motion is granted Plaintiff would need to seek continuance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER JOHNSON VS. SH PROPERTY, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants Responses To Discovery, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 9, 2015, line 4. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER JOHNSON's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Discovery, And Request For Sanctions TRANSFERRED to Department 301 to be heard on June 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 301 no later than June 12, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing department and date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 9, 2015, line 5. PLAINTIFF NATALIA OKS' Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA GATTI VS. CHARLES FERGUSON ET AL

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. LILY P. DE LEON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For An Order Compelling Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 9, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT LILY DE LEON's Motion For An Order Compelling Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Plaintiff shall provide responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Requests for Production without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $900. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMANDA ESTELLE ARCHULETA VS. HOLLY GONGOB ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 9, 2015, line 9. PLAINTIFF AMANDA ARCHULETA's Motion To Tax Costs DENIED. Defendants shall recover costs per Memorandum of Costs. Requests for sanctions are denied. Neither Defendant nor Plaintiff showed compliance with CCP 128.5(f) (safe harbor). = (501/REQ)
